zh-CN.name: 画家
zh-CN.intro: 画家是用画笔和颜料画出漂亮图画的人。他们能画出小花、小动物，还有美丽的风景，让我们的世界变得更美。

story.title: 🎨小猫咪的第一幅画
story.body: 小猫咪看到墙上挂着一幅美丽的画，有蓝蓝的天空和金色的太阳。妈妈说：这是画家叔叔画的。小猫咪好羡慕，它也想当画家。妈妈带它去画室，画家叔叔穿着花围裙，笑眯眯地递来一支小画笔。小猫咪在画布上涂涂抹抹，画了一朵歪歪扭扭的小花。画家叔叔说：真棒！你再画几只小蝴蝶吧。小猫咪开心地画呀画，最后一幅五颜六色的画完成了。它把画挂在家里，每天看到都很快乐。它说：我长大也要当一个让大家都开心的画家！

knowledge.title: 画家怎么画画的？
knowledge.body: 画家先用铅笔轻轻画出轮廓，再用画笔蘸颜料涂色。调色板上有好多颜色，像彩虹一样。画布就像一张大纸，可以画大大的画。有的画家站着画，有的坐着画，可认真啦！

en.name: Painter
en.intro: A painter is someone who uses brushes and paints to create beautiful pictures. They can paint flowers, animals, and lovely scenery, making our world more colorful.

story.title: 🎨The Little Cat's First Painting
story.body: The little cat saw a beautiful painting on the wall with a blue sky and a golden sun. Mama said, 'The painter uncle made that.' The little cat wished it could be a painter too. Mama took it to the art studio. The painter uncle wore a colorful apron and smiled, handing over a little brush. The little cat dabbled and doodled on the canvas, drawing a wobbly little flower. The painter uncle said, 'Wonderful! Now try a few butterflies.' The little cat happily painted away, and soon a colorful picture was done. It hung the painting at home and felt happy every time it looked at it. It said, 'When I grow up, I want to be a painter who makes everyone happy!'

knowledge.title: How do painters paint?
knowledge.body: Painters first lightly sketch an outline with a pencil, then use brushes to apply paint. The palette has many colors, just like a rainbow. A canvas is like a big piece of paper for big paintings. Some painters stand, some sit, and they work very carefully!
